summary: CreatorVerse AI PRO - A YouTube content creator tool with AI chat, title generator, script generator, SEO score checker, tags generator, hashtag generator, AI voice generator with 5 styles, and thumbnail generator
architectural_notes: Single-page HTML app with embedded CSS and JavaScript
Uses Web Speech API for text-to-speech voice generation
Canvas API for thumbnail image generation
Dark theme with slate blue background (#0f172a)
Rule-based AI chat using keyword matching

existing_features.title: Implement AI chat interface with conversational memory that provides YouTube creator advice including tips on titles, viral content, scripts, and SEO when users ask questions

Create title generator that takes a topic input and generates YouTube video titles using emotional hooks including '🔥 Secret of', '😱 Shocking Truth About', 'Top 5', 'Ultimate Guide to', and 'You Must Know' prefixes randomly selected
Build script generator that creates structured YouTube video scripts with sections for hook, intro, three main points, and ending call-to-action using the entered topic
Implement SEO score checker that calculates a score out of 100 based on topic length and provides optimization tips for long-tail keywords and emotional words
Create tags generator that produces comma-separated YouTube tags including the topic, 'viral', 'youtube growth', 'trending video', and 'how to'
Build hashtag generator that creates space-removed hashtags from the topic and appends '#viral #youtube #creator' tags
Implement AI voice generator with 5 voice styles (normal, deep, soft, robot, fast) that uses browser speech synthesis to speak user-entered text with different rate and pitch settings for each style
Create thumbnail generator using HTML canvas that draws a yellow background (#facc15) with user-entered text centered in bold black font on a 400x250 pixel canvas

Apply dark theme design with slate background (#0f172a), white text, green action buttons (#22c55e with #16a34a hover), rounded input fields and buttons, and dark chat box (#020617) matching the reference design

new_feature_requests.summary: AI chat with memory for YouTube creator tips
AI voice generator with 5 styles (normal, deep, soft, robot, fast)
